name: Ritual Beast Ulti-Gaiapelio
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ガイアペライオ
desc:
1 "Ritual Beast Ulti" monster + 1 "Ritual Beast Tamer" monster + 1 "Spiritual Beast" monster
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. If Summoned this way, this card gains this effect.
● When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated (Quick Effect): You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" card from your hand; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
